config_source: frozen-dataclass defaults in configs/ at the recorded git commit; reproduced by re-running the listed reproduction_command from the same commit
archival_note: This control is a freeze-BY-COPY of an existing successful reproduction of the Bordelon baseline under outputs/<script_stem>/. It was NOT produced by a fresh invocation of the reproduction_command by this freezer; the freezer copies, hashes (SHA-256), and marks read-only the pre-existing artifacts as an immutable archival control baseline. To regenerate these artifacts from scratch, run the reproduction_command from the recorded git_commit on an equivalent environment.
